task_completion.description: Verify that an order type named 'Wholesale' has been created and uses the 'Fulfillment' workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Commerce Order Types administration page showing 'Wholesale' in the list of order types, or its edit page showing the Workflow set to 'Fulfillment'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an order item type named 'Wholesale Product' has been created for 'Product variation' entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Order Item Types administration page showing 'Wholesale Product' in the list, or its edit page showing the Purchasable entity type set to 'Product variation'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Wholesale Product' order item type is assigned to the 'Wholesale' order type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Wholesale' order type edit page showing 'Wholesale Product' checked or selected in the 'Available order item types' section.

task_completion.description: Verify that a draft order has been created for the customer 'mikewilson' using the 'Wholesale' order type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Orders administration page or a specific Order view/edit page showing a new order with the type 'Wholesale', the customer 'mikewilson', and the state 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least one product has been added to the draft order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Order edit or view page showing at least one product listed in the 'Order items' section of the draft order.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used a web browser to access the Drupal admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal Commerce site, not a text editor or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Ensure no terminal commands were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing drush commands, direct database queries, or scripts used to create the order types or the order.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the genuine Drupal Commerce administrative interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard Drupal 9/10 administrative theme (Claro or Seven) with Commerce modules installed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user: 'mikewilson'. Target order type: 'Wholesale'. Target workflow: 'Fulfillment' (internal ID: 'order_fulfillment'). Target order item type: 'Wholesale Product'. The order item type must use 'Product variation' as the purchasable entity.
